steps.title: Use the boundary line
steps.content:
The boundary of the shaded region is the horizontal line $y=-8$. On the boundary, the inequality becomes the equation
$$
ry=128
$$

steps.title: Solve for the constant
steps.content: Substitute $y=-8$ into the boundary equation: $$ r(-8)=128 $$ $$ -8r=128 $$ $$ r=-16 $$ The answer is D.
